---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: 为项目提出功能建议 / Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 问题背景 / Is your feature request related to a problem?
请描述遇到的痛点或不便之处。
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 期望方案 / Describe the solution you'd like
请描述你希望的解决方案。
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 替代方案 / Describe alternatives you've considered
是否考虑过其他方案？
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 补充说明 / Additional context
其他截图或相关信息。
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## 是否愿意参与开发？ / Would you like to implement this feature?
- [ ] 是，我愿意开发 / Yes, I'd like to work on this
- [ ] 不，但愿意测试 / No, but I'd be happy to test it
- [ ] 仅建议 / Just suggesting
